info.title: seqob/v1/relay.proto
info.description:
SeqOB relay wire protocol. The relay is a non-custodial matchmaker + message
courier: it stores signed offers, serves the per-pair book (snapshot + deltas),
and pipes opaque, end-to-end-encrypted swap-session messages between two peers.
It never holds keys, never signs, never blinds, never holds a spendable PSET,
never broadcasts user funds, and never decrypts the courier payload.
